title: About This Site
description: A quiet, GitHub-backed publishing space for notes, essays, and ongoing research.
content:
This site is designed to feel simple on the surface and dependable underneath. It is a place for writing in public, collecting ideas, and publishing work without turning the process into overhead.

📦 Every post is stored directly in a GitHub repository, so the entire archive stays versioned, portable, and easy to maintain.

🚀 There is no traditional backend and no serverless layer in the publishing flow. The site is intentionally static, lightweight, and fast.

✏️ Posts can be edited through a visual interface and committed straight back to the repository, which keeps writing approachable without losing the benefits of source control.

🔑 Editing is open by design, while publishing remains protected through the owner's private key.

## Principles

- Write clearly and publish calmly.
- Keep the system lightweight.
- Make the archive durable.
- Treat the blog as a long-term body of work, not a feed to optimize.

## Tech Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Motion
- GitHub API
